title: [phase:repair] [family:verification] [provider_hint:codex] Current task: openclaw-tmux replacement. Review the prototype tests and propose the next 4 verification additions needed before canary. Keep it concise. No edits.
summary_text: Most likely next blocker(s) after binary discovery succeeds: 1. **NotebookLM live auth/permission failure** The gate still requires real execution (`LIVE_SMOKE_MODE=required` + `EXECUTE_LIVE_MODE=required`), so `nlm notebook create` / source add / artifact create can fail if runner auth is stale or not fully granted. 2. **CLI contract/version mismatch on the discovered global `nlm`** Binary may exist but not match expected subcommands/output shape; adapter then fails at ID extraction (`notebook_id` / `artifact_id`) even though discovery passed. 3. **Late-stage issue comment side effect on push canary** `finalize` still posts `gh issue comment` (issue `499` path on push). If that issue/token path is invalid, the run can fail after smoke logic succeeds.
